finding: `taskflow pre-close` and close dry-run treated `validate:git-head-evidence` as advisory, but close write required `validationPasses/validate:git-head-evidence` and failed with `ATM_TASK_CLOSE_CLOSURE_PACKET_INVALID`; the validator had to be discovered and run manually. This extends row 148 from the specific `validate:cli` omission to an inconsistent validator contract.
expectedBehavior: One shared closure-readiness calculation should drive pre-close, dry-run, and close-write; every closure-required validator must appear in the dry-run blocker/command plan, or none should be required by the write packet.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced on TASK-AAO-0173: close write reported the missing git-head pass after dry-run showed no blockers; `npm run validate:git-head-evidence` then passed and close succeeded.
followUp: Add a regression asserting identical required-validator sets and command-backed evidence requirements across pre-close, dry-run, and write.
